exercises.title: Merge Operation Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate the merge operation between two surface code patches.
tasks: Create two logical qubit states in surface code patches
Implement rough merge (ZZ measurement)
Track stabilizer changes during merge
Extract joint measurement outcome
Verify state correlation after merge
hints: New stabilizers span the merge region
Joint ZZ eigenvalue from stabilizer products

exercises.title: Lattice Surgery CNOT
exercises.description: Implement full CNOT via lattice surgery.
tasks: Prepare ancilla in |+_L⟩
Perform ZZ merge between control and ancilla
Perform XX merge between ancilla and target
Measure ancilla and apply corrections
Verify CNOT action on various input states
hints: First merge: ZZ between control and ancilla
Second merge: XX between ancilla and target

exercises.title: Layout Optimizer
exercises.description: Optimize surface code patch layout for a given circuit.
tasks: Input: circuit with CNOT gates between logical qubits
Place data patches on 2D grid
Add routing patches where needed
Minimize total patch count and routing distance
Output layout visualization
hints: Routing patches fill gaps between data
Consider both X and Y directions for surgery
Trade-off: more routing = more flexibility but more qubits

exercises.title: Surgery Scheduler
exercises.description: Schedule lattice surgery operations to minimize time.
tasks: Input: circuit as sequence of logical gates
Identify independent gates that can run in parallel
Assign time slots to each surgery operation
Track resource conflicts (shared patches)
Output: schedule with total time estimate
hints: Same patch can't be in two surgeries simultaneously
